comment: Measured from pre-refactor ref f0084fb in deterministic mock mode over all 12 golden probes.

per_probe.agent_sql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS revenue
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS order_count
FROM orders

SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS average_order_value
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'

SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at) AS month,
       SUM(total_amount) AS revenue
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT status, COUNT(*)::bigint AS order_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY status

SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT customer_id,
       SUM(total_amount - amount_paid) AS overdue_amount
FROM orders
WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing')
  AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY customer_id
ORDER BY overdue_amount DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS order_count
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 3, 1))
  AND created_at < date_trunc('month', make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 4, 1))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS refunded_amount
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'refunded'
  AND created_at >= date_trunc('quarter', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '3 months'
  AND created_at < date_trunc('quarter', CURRENT_DATE)

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'refunded')::numeric
  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed', 'refunded')), 0) AS refund_rate
FROM orders

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS revenue
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'completed'
SELECT status, COUNT(*)::bigint AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
